It requires a petition signed by at least fifty reputable, house-owning, tax-paying legal voters to initiate a vote on a property or poll tax. The tax rate is capped at twenty-five cents per one hundred dollars of taxable property or one dollar per poll. If a majority of votes are in favor, the tax is levied and collected like other county taxes, with funds paid to teachers, except as provided in section 26, article VI.
